MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on for small claims appeal as scheduled.
Appearances: Joseph Goodwin appeared on behalf of Respondent Pacific Gas & Electric, and informed the Court that the parties jointly requested a continuance of the hearing. The matter was continued to February 23, 2005 at 9:00 am in Dept. 525. Respondent to give notice of the continued hearing.
Judge: Wallace P. Douglass; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported.
